mapper.select: select ( (select count(1) from payment_channel_contract where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and del_flag = 0 and channel_id = #{channelId}) + (select count(1) from payment_order where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and channel_id = #{channelId}) + (select count(1) from payment_reconciliation where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and del_flag = 0 and channel_code = #{channelCode}) + (select count(1) from payment_settlement_summary where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and del_flag = 0 and channel_code = #{channelCode}) )
